_note: Footprint matches wall/roof fixtures (a={x:-6,y:-5}, b={x:6,y:5}). Thickness pinned at DEFAULT_SLAB_THICKNESS=0.1m (IFC reference #34509 uses 0.2m — different; fixture pins the builder, not IFC round-trip). geom.translate(0,0,t/2) offsets geometry so z=[0,t] in local space; mesh.position.z=0.
